Uses of Record Class
com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D.Layout

Packages that use BoardLabels3D.Layout
Package
Description
com.example.battleship.view.assets
 

  • Uses of BoardLabels3D.Layout in com.example.battleship.view.assets

    Methods in com.example.battleship.view.assets that return BoardLabels3D.Layout
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static BoardLabels3D.Layout
    BoardLabels3D.Layout.player()
    The confirmed-good layout for the player's own board: letters past row 10 (south edge) in normal A..J order, numbers before column A (west edge) but counting down 10..1.
    static BoardLabels3D.Layout
    BoardLabels3D.Layout.standard()
    Letters past row 10, numbers past column J, letters read J..A -- the confirmed machine-board layout.
    Methods in com.example.battleship.view.assets with parameters of type BoardLabels3D.Layout
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static javafx.scene.Group
    BoardLabels3D.build(BoardLabels3D.Layout layout, BoardLabels3D.Board board)
    Builds one full set of column-letter and row-number labels for a board, positioned in that board's own local 0..360 coordinates (relative to whatever group the caller adds the result to).
